description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows along the main facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. The building is surrounded by manicured green lawns, a rectangular swimming pool, and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, including a prominent purple-flowering tree. The exterior is primarily composed of smooth, light gray concrete or stucco, with some sections featuring glass and metal accents. The layout is sprawling and horizontal, with multiple wings and outdoor living spaces, including a covered patio area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with expansive glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, featuring a minimalist and open architectural style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, landscaped entry path, and a covered patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and the pool area extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, extensive glass facade, and a prominent purple-flowering tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the rear patio, garden elements, and the building's horizontal layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows along the main facade
